title: Refugee Reception and Residence Area (Declaration) Order, 1969
title_en: Refugee Reception and Residence Area (Declaration) Order, 1969

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Refugee Reception and Residence Area (Declaration) Order.

The following are hereby declared to be the areas for the reception and residence of persons declared to be refugees under the Refugee (Declaration) Order. Schedule Name of reception and residence area District Region Dabalo Dodoma Dodoma Mpevi Kibondo Kigoma Nduta Kibondo Kigoma Kanembwe Kibondo Kigoma Mtandali Kibondo Kigoma Nyaruvano Kigoma Kigoma Lukole Ngara Kagera Nyarugusu Kasulu Kigoma Herushingo Kasulu Kigoma Kasulo Ngara Kagera Lumasi Ngara Kagera Masuhura Hill Ngara Kagera Mulonzi Ngara Kagera Kyabalisa I Karagwe Kagera Kyabalisa II Karagwe Kagera Rubwera Karagwe Karagwe Kagenyi Karagwe Karagwe Omukariro Karagwe Karagwe History of this document 31 July 2002 this version Consolidation Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
